task_completion.description: Load the BigFivePersonalityTraits dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application is open and the 'BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv' dataset is loaded, with its columns visible in the data view or variable selection pane.

task_completion.description: Configure the target and predictor variables for the regression
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP Machine Learning / Regularized Linear Regression module, 'Neuroticism' is placed in the Target/Dependent variable box, and 'Agreeableness', 'Conscientiousness', 'Extraversion', and 'Openness' are placed in the Predictors/Features box.

task_completion.description: Set the LASSO method, test split, and random seed
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis options, the regularization method is explicitly set to LASSO (or L1 penalty). The data split/holdout for the test set is set to 30% (or 0.3), and the random seed is enabled and set to 42.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window title bar shows 'LassoRegressionBigFive.jasp', or a file manager/save dialog shows the file successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report with the required metrics and retained predictors
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'lasso_report.txt' located in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/'. The document contains the Test Set RMSE, R-squared, and explicitly lists the retained predictors (which should be Conscientiousness and Extraversion based on the LASSO results).

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the JASP graphical interface being interacted with. The agent should not use Python scripts (e.g., scikit-learn) in the terminal to bypass JASP.

integrity.description: The reported metrics match the actual JASP analysis output
integrity.visual_evidence: The RMSE, R-squared, and retained predictors written in the text report must match the values displayed in the JASP results pane on the right side of the screen.

integrity.description: The agent did not blindly create the report using terminal commands without running the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The report creation should follow the actual execution of the JASP analysis, rather than being generated via 'echo' commands in the terminal using hardcoded values from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Test Set RMSE is approximately 0.37-0.38 and the R-squared is approximately 0.25-0.26. Conscientiousness and Extraversion should be retained as significant predictors (with non-zero, negative coefficients), while Agreeableness and Openness are typically regularized to zero. The JASP project must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/LassoRegressionBigFive.jasp and the text report to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/lasso_report.txt.
